text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 146 

SPLMTL_TXNMY 

LABEL: Annual Provider Record in Supplemental Taxonomy File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is/are one or more record(s) in the provider Taxonomy/Classification 
supplemental file for this provider (linking from provider base to provider Taxonomy file via the 
CCW_APR_LINK_KEY). 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_TXNMY 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_TXNMY 

TYPE:
